name: The Anti Camera
premise: Monitor your health and home security in total darkness without generating or storing a single pixel of video.
hook: What if you could track your sleep, detect falls, and guard your house without placing a single creepy camera indoors?
motif: Camera lenses shattering into abstract wireframe skeletal poses derived purely from RF data
sections: Setting Up Home Assistant Automation Triggers
why_it_fits: Directly targets the core value proposition of non-optical, privacy-first spatial intelligence.
